creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: dhn
Date: Thu Aug 16 17:34:43 2012
New Revision: 302651
URL: http://svn.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/302651

Log:
  - Update to 2.5.9 [0]
  - Update MASTER_SITES [1]
  
  PR:		ports/170579 ports/170659
  Submitted by:	nemysis <nemysis@gmx.ch> [0]
  Submitted by:	Jason Helfman <jgh@FreeBSD.org> [1]

Modified:
  head/multimedia/youtube-viewer/Makefile
  head/multimedia/youtube-viewer/distinfo
  head/multimedia/youtube-viewer/pkg-descr

Modified: head/multimedia/youtube-viewer/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/multimedia/youtube-viewer/Makefile	Thu Aug 16 17:26:54 2012	(r302650)
+++ head/multimedia/youtube-viewer/Makefile	Thu Aug 16 17:34:43 2012	(r302651)
@@ -6,10 +6,9 @@
 #
 
 PORTNAME=	youtube
-PORTVERSION=	2.5.5
-PORTREVISION=	1
+PORTVERSION=	2.5.9
 CATEGORIES=	multimedia
-MASTER_SITES=	${MASTER_SITE_GOOGLE_CODE:S|youtube|trizen|g} \
+MASTER_SITES=	GOOGLE_CODE \
 		${MASTER_SITE_LOCAL}
 MASTER_SITE_SUBDIR=	dhn
 PKGNAMESUFFIX=	-viewer
@@ -18,11 +17,14 @@ DISTNAME=	${PORTNAME}${PKGNAMESUFFIX}-${
 MAINTAINER=	dhn@FreeBSD.org
 COMMENT=	Search and play YouTube videos streaming in MPlayer
 
+LICENSE=	GPLv3
+
 RUN_DEPENDS=	p5-XML-Fast>=0:${PORTSDIR}/net/p5-XML-Fast \
 		p5-libwww>=0:${PORTSDIR}/www/p5-libwww \
 		p5-Term-ANSIColor>=0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/p5-Term-ANSIColor \
 		mplayer:${PORTSDIR}/multimedia/mplayer
 
+PROJECTHOST=	trizen
 USE_PERL5_RUN=	yes
 NO_BUILD=	yes
 PLIST_FILES=	bin/youtube-viewer
@@ -31,7 +33,6 @@ post-patch:
 	@${REINPLACE_CMD} -e "s|#!/usr/bin/perl|#!${PERL}|g" ${WRKDIR}/youtube-viewer
 
 do-install:
-	@${CHMOD} +x ${WRKDIR}/youtube-viewer
 	@${INSTALL_SCRIPT} ${WRKDIR}/youtube-viewer ${PREFIX}/bin/
 
 .include <bsd.port.mk>

Modified: head/multimedia/youtube-viewer/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- head/multimedia/youtube-viewer/distinfo	Thu Aug 16 17:26:54 2012	(r302650)
+++ head/multimedia/youtube-viewer/distinfo	Thu Aug 16 17:34:43 2012	(r302651)
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
-SHA256 (youtube-viewer-2.5.5.tar.gz) = 180a8c060d3e7966df25248e822c962a978257055d80fd3eb642cb1ea9b377b4
-SIZE (youtube-viewer-2.5.5.tar.gz) = 16213
+SHA256 (youtube-viewer-2.5.9.tar.gz) = 35bd5afb24ed61ef13773321cc8a3555c6421f92051483f52fdf58cf45ef0591
+SIZE (youtube-viewer-2.5.9.tar.gz) = 19041

Modified: head/multimedia/youtube-viewer/pkg-descr
==============================================================================
--- head/multimedia/youtube-viewer/pkg-descr	Thu Aug 16 17:26:54 2012	(r302650)
+++ head/multimedia/youtube-viewer/pkg-descr	Thu Aug 16 17:34:43 2012	(r302651)
@@ -1,5 +1,5 @@
-Youtube Viewer
+Youtube Viewer is a CLI application dedicated for searching and streaming
+Youtube Videos with MPlayer. It has been written in Perl and plays videos
+from Youtube at the best quality available without using a flash player.
 
-This script plays a clip from YouTube with MPlayer, supports 720p and 1080p.
-
-WWW:	http://trizen.go.ro/
+WWW:    https://code.google.com/p/trizen/
